title: Super Survival
description: Best survival experience including Custom terrain, Mini maps, sleeping bags and more!
body:
One of the best modpacks you can use if you want to play modded survival. There will be instructions on how to craft all modded items in the JEI (Just Enough Items) menu. You can visit all the mod's pages for instructions on other stuff included. This modpack includes Terralith which modifies the terrain generation, so if you are looking forward to using a seed, you will need to remove that mod. This modpack also includes iris, meaning you can use custom shaders. Thank you for reading, and have fun!

P.S. I tested this modpack on my potato laptop and it runs pretty well so i guess its low end support too
